summary: Mobile-only (390x844) verification of 3 targeted fixes: Landing vs Offers price parity (Essential 12тВм), Lenis syncTouch enablement, and PageTransition popLayout. All three PASS on preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.js is still 632 lines тАФ pricing cards block (lines 205-253 + render 488-547) should be extracted into a <PricingCard/> component to stay DRY with Offers.js (which renders its own cards inline lines 183-264). The two lists share identical pricing but diverge in presentation, which is the kind of drift that caused the original 13тВм vs 12тВм bug. Consider a shared pricing source (constants file or API) so Landing cannot go out of sync again.

smoothScroll.js uses `l.options?.touchInertiaMultiplier` which returned undefined at runtime even though it is passed in the Lenis constructor тАФ Lenis may not echo that key back on `.options`. Harmless for behavior but misleading if used as a sanity-check attribute.

PageTransition relies on AnimatePresence `mode=popLayout` which intentionally keeps sibling motion.div nodes in the DOM briefly; during the 380ms window, page components are mounted twice (count=6 observed). Ensure pages do not run exclusive side-effects in render/useEffect that would collide (e.g. singleton toasts, focus traps, window event listeners) тАФ none observed on Landing/Offers, but a note for future heavy routes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL: https://feature-grid-mobile.preview.emergentagent.com/. Mobile 390x844 verified. Lenis exposes `window.__LENIS__` with syncTouch:true, syncTouchLerp:0.075, lerp:0.08 (touchInertiaMultiplier not mirrored on .options but passed via constructor). PageTransition uses mode=popLayout тАФ during SPA navigation count of `div.flex-1.flex.flex-col` temporarily rises to 6 (both pages mounted) before settling. Use `[data-testid="hero-cta-primary"]` or nav-links (nav-home/nav-offers/nav-gift-cards) for SPA navigation tests, NOT page.goto which triggers full reload and bypasses AnimatePresence.

landing_pricing_mobile.premium: 35тВм (strike 50тВм), 3.50тВм per link, 10 links, badge 'Best value', perk 'save 30%'
